product.name: 360° Rotating Book Stand for Reading, Adjustable Foldable Book Holder for Reading, Cooking, Office, Compatible with Cookbooks, Textbooks, Tablets, Sheet Music, and Laptops (Black Walnut)
features: 360° Smooth Rotation & Adjustable Angle: Effortlessly rotate and tilt the book stand to find your perfect reading or viewing angle. Ideal for sharing content during meetings, studying, or cooking, this stand reduces neck and back strain for a comfortable experience.
Space-Saving Foldable Book Holder - This foldable book holder takes up very little space, so you can easily store the foldable book holder in a drawer or on a desk when not in use.

Multi-Device Cookbook Holder & Tablet Stand: The Cookbook Holder can hold a variety of sizes and styles of books, recipes, tablets, magazines, drawings, sheet music, and laptops, ideal for longtime readers.

Excellent Quality Textbook Stand Construction: The support bar and base are made of high quality titanium steel to ensure durability, the panel is made of natural wood, flat and non-cracking, anti-scratch rounded corners, smooth and burr-free, high-toughness spring-loaded book blocking clips, and silicone tip prevents paper from being damaged.

Ergonomic Reading Book Stand Gift : Elevates the book to eye level, providing multiple angles and heights. Promotes proper posture, reduces spinal load, relieves fatigue or pain, and improves reading comfort. This is the perfect gift for family, friends and coworkers.
